result.summary: Found 4 issues on the BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, including truncated content, layout clipping, and minor styling concerns.

issues.description: Game cards in the right column are visually clipped/cut off. The third column of game thumbnails (e.g., 'Magni Pho...', 'Munc Mi...', 'Hyperc...', 'Dark Wate...') are cropped at the right edge, making their titles and content unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the horizontal scroll or carousel properly handles overflow, or adjust the grid layout so all cards are fully visible or clearly indicate scrollability with a visible scrollbar or arrow indicator.

issues.description: Game titles in the third column are truncated mid-word (e.g., 'Magni Pho...', 'Munc Mi...', 'Hyperc...', 'Dark Wate...'), making them unreadable and unprofessional.
issues.suggestion: Use proper text truncation with ellipsis within the card bounds, or ensure the full card width is visible. If it's a carousel, add navigation arrows to indicate scrollable content.

issues.description: The navigation tab row at the top (Home, Tourney, Jackpots, Hot Ga...) also clips the last tab label 'Hot Ga...' without a clear scroll indicator.
issues.suggestion: Add a fade or arrow indicator at the right edge of the tab bar to communicate horizontal scrollability to users.

issues.description: The jackpot amounts displayed on game cards ($6,260.26 and $13,014.18) use inconsistent positioning — some appear at the bottom of the card while others do not have amounts shown, creating visual inconsistency.
issues.suggestion: Standardize the placement and display of jackpot amounts across all game cards for a consistent visual hierarchy.
